text: Wait — Turn 1 has 110 calls including the original Turn 1 exploration AND Turn 2's work (because `-c` continued the session, so both turns' iterations got interleaved in the proxy). Let me check:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input:
{"command": "# Check if turns 1+2 are in the same proxy run
echo "=== run_20260407_182127 (first proxy session) ==="
ls /tmp/claude_captures/run_20260407_182127/ | grep "_summary.txt$" | grep -v response | tail -5
echo "..."
echo "Total: $(ls /tmp/claude_captures/run_20260407_182127/ | grep "_summary.txt$" | grep -v response | wc -l)"

echo ""
echo "=== run_20260407_185256 (second proxy session) ==="
ls /tmp/claude_captures/run_20260407_185256/ | grep "_summary.txt$" | grep -v response | tail -5
echo "..."
echo "Total: $(ls /tmp/claude_captures/run_20260407_185256/ | grep "_summary.txt$" | grep -v response | wc -l)"

echo ""
echo "=== run_20260407_191222 (third proxy session) ==="  
ls /tmp/claude_captures/run_20260407_191222/ | grep "_summary.txt$" | grep -v response | tail -5
echo "..."
echo "Total: $(ls /tmp/claude_captures/run_20260407_191222/ | grep "_summary.txt$" | grep -v response | wc -l)"", "description": "Check run contents"}
